title: Shift self-evolution summary later
summary: Move the daily summary to a time when the user is more likely to be awake.
humanSummary: Proposal to move the daily self-evolution summary later in the morning.
rationale: Current timing may be too early for useful review.
A later summary could improve visibility and feedback quality.
risks: Summary may overlap with other morning workflows.
rollbackPlan: restore the previous cron schedule if the later summary underperforms
re-check summary usefulness after the rollback
validationChecks: confirm the new schedule does not collide with existing morning jobs
compare user engagement for 3 days before keeping the change
